understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem '+' by navigating the grid, using horizontal moves that trigger gravity-based falling until landing on solid tiles, while clicking to remove breakable blocks that block the path.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is limited to MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT; after each horizontal move, gravity pulls the player continuously in the current direction (DOWN = toward lower y) until hitting a solid tile, hazard, or goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks at target coordinates without advancing timers. Hazards (spikes) cause instant death if landed on. Gravity direction can flip in some levels. UNDO reverts the last action for recovery.
